title: Uncle from Another World
description:
After being in a coma for seventeen years following a traffic accident, Takafumi’s uncle suddenly wakes up speaking an unknown language and claiming that he spent all those years living in a fantasy world. At first nobody believes his strange stories, but Takafumi soon discovers that his uncle truly possesses magical powers brought back from the other world. Wanting to understand his bizarre experiences, Takafumi begins living with his uncle while listening to stories about his adventures in the fantasy realm.

Although his uncle survived dangerous battles, powerful monsters, and magical quests, his awkward personality and inability to understand social situations often turned his heroic journey into complete chaos. Together with Takafumi and his friend Fujimiya, the group revisits the uncle’s memories while reacting to his misunderstandings, failed romances, and ridiculous adventures. Blending fantasy, parody, and comedy, Uncle from Another World delivers a hilarious and unique twist on the isekai genre.
